Cheatsheets Documentation
=========================

Purpose
-------
Quick-reference summaries for day-to-day implementation work.

Cheatsheet Guidelines
---------------------
- Keep examples compact and copyable.
- Include API caveats and ISR/task-context notes.
- Provide one minimal pattern snippet per page.

Planned Pages
-------------
- ``rtos_basics_cheatsheet.rst``
- ``freertos_cheatsheet.rst``
- ``zephyr_cheatsheet.rst``
- ``chibios_cheatsheet.rst``
- ``threadx_cheatsheet.rst``
- ``embos_cheatsheet.rst``
- ``nuttx_cheatsheet.rst``
- ``px5_cheatsheet.rst``
- ``ecos_cheatsheet.rst``
